title: Paid Campaign
intro: The first paid campaign focuses on awareness-to-trial conversion by meeting overwhelmed users in moments of stress and promising immediate relief.

campaign.name: Pause. Reset. Go Again.
campaign.objective: Drive free trial sign-ups among students and young professionals.
campaign.bigIdea: A tiny reset can restore the quality of the rest of your day.
campaign.emotionalHook: When everything feels heavy, a few guided minutes can help you feel more capable again.
campaign.audienceSummary: Students under deadline pressure and young professionals navigating multitasking, mental fatigue, and digital overload.
targetingPlan: Interest targeting: wellness, productivity, student life, stress management
Behavioral targeting: frequent video viewers, app trial users, mindfulness content engagers
Retargeting: site visitors, video viewers, and challenge participants
expectedOutcomes: High short-form video completion from relatable hooks
Low-friction free trial clicks from practical value messaging
Improved recall through consistent creative direction

adMockups.headline: Feeling overloaded?
adMockups.adCopy: Take a 3-minute guided reset with CalmCove and step back into your day with more focus.
adMockups.visualAlt: Paid ad mockup focused on overload relief.

adMockups.headline: Your next break can actually help.
adMockups.adCopy: Swap mindless scrolling for a calming audio reset made for students and busy professionals.
adMockups.visualAlt: Paid ad mockup focused on productive reset breaks.
